name: ball
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create ball'. Controls ball rendering, coloring by attributes, arrow shape for vector fields, cut planes, and legend display.

basic_keywords.description: Show item in plot (default when created)
Show color legend for this item
basic_keywords.notes: Recommended when using color-by or cut

basic_keywords.description: Configure color scale for numeric/vector attributes
basic_keywords.syntax: color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic
basic_keywords.notes: Appended after color-by for continuous color mapping

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color balls by vector, numeric, or text attributes (velocity, displacement, group, etc.)

sub_items.name: cut
sub_items.description: Clip visualization with a cutting plane

sub_items.name: shape
sub_items.description: Arrow shape for vector field visualization

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create ball active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Show all balls with default coloring

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create ball active on color-by vector-attribute "velocity" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Rainbow color scale from min to max velocity

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create ball active on color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true legend active on
